summary: CDC reports 910 confirmed cases as of Feb 12, 2026. SC outbreak at 933 (state count). Rate ~25/day but SC slowing. Need 15.4/day average to reach 2000 by Apr 24.
content:
Key data points:
- CDC Feb 12: 910 cumulative confirmed cases, 24 jurisdictions
- CDC Feb 5: 733 cases (177 new in 7 days = 25.3/day)
- SC outbreak: 933 cases as of Feb 10, clearly decelerating (from ~44/4days to 13/4days)
- 90% of cases are outbreak-associated, 5 new outbreaks in 2026
- 2025 full year: 2,276 cases (record since 1992)
- 2025 at same point: ~120 cases
- Target: 2,000 by April 24 (71 days away)
- Required rate: 15.4 cases/day (current rate 25.3/day)
- SC outbreak is the dominant driver but appears to be winding down
- Geographic spread is ongoing (14 → 24 jurisdictions in 3 weeks)
